Processes linker scripts and supports converting linked targets to various file formats using objcopy.


## Files
- **[ldscript.py](ldscript.py.md)**: Processes linker scripts for C programs and shared libraries using Waf build system.
- **[objcopy.py](objcopy.py.md)**: Support for converting linked targets to ihex, srec, or binary files using objcopy in a build system.
